title: Perinatal Exposure to Traffic-Related Air Pollution and Atopy at 1 Year of Age in a Multi-Center Canadian Birth Cohort Study.
ehr_evidence: The study is a birth cohort study (CHILD study) and does not mention the use of electronic health records.
summary: A multi-center Canadian birth cohort study investigating the association between perinatal exposure to traffic-related air pollution (TRAP) and atopy in children at 1 year of age.
key_findings: The study aims to assess the association between perinatal TRAP exposure and atopy at 1 year of age (results not fully detailed in the provided snippet).
limitations: Limitations of land use regression (LUR) models in capturing fine-scale seasonal variability
